# af completions <shell> emits a valid completion script per shell.

exec af completions bash
stdout 'bash completion'

exec af completions zsh
stdout '#compdef'

exec af completions fish
stdout 'complete -c af'

exec af completions powershell
stdout 'Register-ArgumentCompleter'

! exec af completions tcsh
stderr 'tcsh'

! exec af completions
stderr 'arg'

# ── --install: idempotent per-shell install under a hermetic HOME (issue #22) ─
env HOME=$WORK/home

# Save the stdout-mode zsh script so the installed file can be compared
# against it byte-for-byte.
exec af completions zsh
cp stdout want-zsh.txt

exec af completions zsh --install
stdout 'installed zsh completions: '$HOME'/.zfunc/_af'
stdout 'fpath=\(~/.zfunc \$fpath\)'
stdout 'autoload -Uz compinit && compinit'
exists $HOME/.zfunc/_af
cmp $HOME/.zfunc/_af want-zsh.txt

# Re-running with unchanged content is a no-op (reports up to date,
# does not rewrite).
exec af completions zsh --install
stdout 'completions for zsh already up to date: '$HOME'/.zfunc/_af'

# Stale content at the destination is silently overwritten.
cp fixtures/stale-zsh.txt $HOME/.zfunc/_af
exec af completions zsh --install
stdout 'installed zsh completions: '$HOME'/.zfunc/_af'
cmp $HOME/.zfunc/_af want-zsh.txt

exec af completions bash --install
stdout 'installed bash completions: '$HOME'/.bash_completion.d/af'
stdout 'source `~/.bash_completion.d/af` from ~/.bashrc'
exists $HOME/.bash_completion.d/af

exec af completions fish --install
stdout 'installed fish completions: '$HOME'/.config/fish/completions/af.fish'
stdout 'no action needed'
exists $HOME/.config/fish/completions/af.fish

# powershell has no standard user-local install destination.
! exec af completions powershell --install
stderr 'unsupported completion shell'

# --dry-run without --install is a usage error.
! exec af completions zsh --dry-run
stderr 'dry-run only valid together with --install'

# $SHELL auto-detection: a recognized basename picks that shell; an
# unrecognized or empty $SHELL is a domain usage error.
env SHELL=/bin/zsh
exec af completions --install
stdout $HOME'/.zfunc/_af'

env SHELL=/bin/ksh
! exec af completions --install
stderr 'cannot detect shell from \$SHELL'

env SHELL=
! exec af completions --install
stderr 'cannot detect shell from \$SHELL'

# --dry-run --install writes nothing, under a fresh hermetic HOME.
env HOME=$WORK/home-dryrun
exec af completions zsh --install --dry-run
stdout 'would install zsh completions to '$HOME'/.zfunc/_af'
stdout 'fpath=\(~/.zfunc \$fpath\)'
! exists $HOME/.zfunc/_af
! exists $HOME/.zfunc

-- fixtures/stale-zsh.txt --
# stale completions script from a previous af version; --install must
# overwrite this silently and report "installed", not "already up to date".
